1. the leasehold property known as white river place, st austell, PL25 5AZ. 2. the leasehold property known as land at chandos place, st austell. 3. the leasehold property known as 51-57 aylmer square, st austell. 4. the leasehold property known as cinema building, white river place, south street, st austell. 5. the leasehold property known as land at white. River place, south street, st austell.

3. grant of security 3.1 as a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower charges the property, with full title guarantee, to the lender by way of legal mortgage. 3.2 as a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee assigns to the lender absolutely, subject to a proviso for reassignment on irrevocable discharge in full of the secured liabilities:- 3.2.1 all its rights in any insurance policy, including all claims, the proceeds of all claims and all returns of premiums in connection with each insurance policy; 3.2.2 the rental income; and 3.2.3 the benefit of each assigned agreement provided that nothing in this clause 3 shall constitute the lender as mortgagee in possession. Schedule 1 (property): the leasehold property brief particulars of which are as follows: county and district: cornwall title number: CL272076 property: white river place, st austell, PL25 5AZ county and district: cornwall title number: CL272079 property: land at chandos place, st austell county and district: cornwall title number: CL277801 property: cinema building, white river place, south street, st austell county and district: cornwall title number: CL296141 property: land at white river place, south street, st austell county and district: cornwall title number: CL314406 property: 51-57 aylmer square, st austell please refer to the instrument for further details.

2 charge 2.1 the company hereby covenants on due demand to pay or discharge the indebtedness to the lender. As security for the payment and discharge of the indebtedness, the company hereby charges to the lender, with full title guarantee: 2.1.1 by way of legal mortgage, all freehold and leasehold property now vested in the company including as more particularly described in the schedule hereto, together with all buildings, fixtures (including trade fixtures) and fixed plant and machinery from time to time on that property; 2.1.2 by way of fixed charge, all estates or interests in any freehold and leasehold property of the company (not being property charged by clause 2.1.1) now and in the future vested in the company, together with all buildings, fixtures (including trade fixtures) and fixed plant and machinery from time to time on that property; 2.1.3 by way of fixed charge, all the goodwill and uncalled capital for the time being of the company; 2.1.4 by way of fixed charge, all book debts and other debts now and in the future due or owing to the company; 2.1.5 by way of fixed charge, all intellectual property rights, choses in action and claims now and in the future belonging to the company; 2.1.6 by way of fixed charge all stocks shares and other securities held by the company from time to time in any subsidiary and all income and rights derived from or attaching to them; 2.1.7 by way of fixed charge all stocks shares and other securities of the company present and future (except those charged by clause 2.1.6) and all income and rights derived from or attaching to them; and 2.1.8 by way of floating charge, all the company’s present and future undertaking and assets, whatever and wherever, including (without limitation) all other property and assets not subject to a fixed charge under this debenture. Please refer to the instrument for further details.

Leasehold land known as: white river place, PL25 5AZ registered at the land registry under title no CL272076; land at chandos place, registered at the land registry under title no CL272079; cinema building, st austell, registered at the land registry under title no CL277801; land at white river place, south street and registered at the land registry under title no CL296141 and 51-57 aylmer square, st austell and registered with the land registry under title no CL314406.
